stdout:
## Success criteria vs. issue deliverable
- âś… `ExtConfig` now matches the approved API: `type BaseField: ConstField`, `const NON_RESIDUE: Self::BaseField`, and default `mul_by_non_residue` (`crates/gf2-core/src/gfpn/ext_config.rs:57-79`).
- âś… Concrete `Fp<7>` config with Î˛ = -1 compiles and is tested (`ext_config.rs:94-102`, `126-128`).
- âś… Default `mul_by_non_residue` is checked against manual multiplication (`ext_config.rs:152-164`), and override behavior is also checked (`167-179`).
- âś… Zero-sized config/no runtime overhead is explicitly tested (`ext_config.rs:195-200`).
- âś… Trait shape does not preclude nested towers (`BaseField: ConstField` plus associated const; no runtime storage in trait).

## Separation of concerns
- âś… Changes are confined to `gf2-core` (`gfpn` module export and supporting const-enablement in `gfp`), with no dependency from `gf2-core` to `gf2-coding`.
- âś… Dependency direction remains correct; `gf2-core/src/lib.rs` only adds `pub mod gfpn;` (`crates/gf2-core/src/lib.rs:45`).

## Functional paradigm and performance
- âś… High-level API uses static dispatch and zero-sized config markers (`ExtConfig` trait + associated const), preserving zero-cost abstraction.
- âś… Performance-oriented const changes in `Fp`/Montgomery helpers (`gfp/mod.rs`, `gfp/montgomery.rs`) support compile-time non-residue constants without adding runtime overhead.

## Correctness
- âś… Prior critical API mismatch is fixed: associated const `NON_RESIDUE` is present (old `non_residue()` drift removed).
- âś… Arithmetic correctness for non-residue multiplication is verified over full small fields (`GF(7)`, `GF(13)`) via exhaustive loops (`ext_config.rs:152-189`).
- âś… No `BitVec` mutation paths were touched; tail-masking/bit-numbering invariants are unaffected by this change.

## Testing
- âś… New unit tests cover API contract, default/override behavior, const usage, zero-sized configs, and generic dispatch (`ext_config.rs` test module).
- âś… Lint/format/tests for this issue commit are passing in recorded gate runs:
  - tests: `7ec11db3-1571-4ae8-9b1b-822f2d7411e8` (status `passed`, exit 0, commit `363164f...`)
  - clippy: `d269edcc-acc8-482c-a2eb-5760184dba34` (status `passed`, exit 0)
  - fmt: `82484590-d769-4d04-a12d-a985ac52bd44` (status `passed`, exit 0)

## Unsafe isolation
- âś… No new `unsafe` introduced in changed files (`gfpn/ext_config.rs`, `gfpn/mod.rs`, `gfp/mod.rs`, `gfp/montgomery.rs`, `lib.rs`).
- âś… `gf2-core` still enforces `#![deny(unsafe_code)]` (`crates/gf2-core/src/lib.rs:35`).

## Documentation
- âś… Public-facing docs were added for module and trait with examples (`gfpn/mod.rs`, `gfpn/ext_config.rs`).
- âś… The docs now align with the accepted deliverable (associated const `NON_RESIDUE` and default multiplication hook).

## Prior review feedback
- âś… Addressed: previous fail cited missing `const NON_RESIDUE` and API drift; current implementation restores the exact specified contract (`ext_config.rs:65`).
- âś… No unresolved items from the most recent failed run remain.

## Jit issue dependencies
- âś… Dependency `8ce6f8aa-9252-4ae6-ab5c-e702e961d460` is in `done` state (`.jit/issues/8ce6f8aa-9252-4ae6-ab5c-e702e961d460.json:5`), so prerequisite work is satisfied.

VERDICT: PASS
